surfaces.name: root_help
surfaces.determinism: commander generated; command order is source order
risks: exit codes not documented in help

surfaces.name: parse_errors
surfaces.stdout_data_stderr_diagnostics: json errors go to stdout when --json is present; text errors go to stderr
surfaces.determinism: stable commander codes; message text from commander
risks: error JSON is pretty-printed and larger than lock JSON

surfaces.name: lock_mutations
surfaces.stdout_data_stderr_diagnostics: success text/json on stdout; nonzero result text/json also on stdout
surfaces.determinism: active locks sorted by lock id; generated lock ids include time/random suffix
surfaces.exit_contract: 0 success, 2 invalid input, 3 conflict or ownership failure
risks: status --id-only is useful but still broader than the affected-lock-id wording
prune now has dry-run; acquire/expand/release/git mutations still execute directly

surfaces.name: lock_reads
surfaces.determinism: status lock ids sorted; identify fallback includes host/pid
risks: status read path creates the active lock directory if missing
identify fallback session id is process-specific

surfaces.name: conflicts
surfaces.stdout_data_stderr_diagnostics: conflict details on stdout through normal result renderer
surfaces.json_robot: compact conflict JSON includes suggested_action and conflicting resources
risks: only first conflict is rendered in text mode
retry command is prose, not structured next_command

surfaces.name: install
surfaces.determinism: change order is fixed by install helper order
surfaces.exit_contract: 0 applied or clean check, 1 check drift
risks: recommended scripts include entries not present in this repo

surfaces.name: capabilities
surfaces.determinism: stable source-order command inventory and static defaults

surfaces.name: doctor_health
risks: no single command validates config, lock dirs, mutex state, and install drift

ranked_candidates.candidate: Add robot-docs guide or concise agent handbook
ranked_candidates.why: Complements capabilities with copy-pasteable human-readable agent workflow guidance.
ranked_candidates.test_need: Subprocess/golden assertion for concise command examples.

ranked_candidates.candidate: Improve parse error suggestions for common flag typos
ranked_candidates.why: Raises error pedagogy and intent inference for first-try failures.
ranked_candidates.test_need: Subprocess tests for --jsno/--jason and unsupported command hints.

ranked_candidates.candidate: Add compact install check JSON or field selection
ranked_candidates.why: Reduces token cost for dry-run install drift checks.
ranked_candidates.test_need: Install JSON schema tests and README update.

ranked_candidates.candidate: Make install JSON compact by default with optional verbose/full output
ranked_candidates.why: Dry-run JSON is useful but token-heavy.
ranked_candidates.test_need: Install JSON schema tests and README update.

ranked_candidates.why: Useful after core machine-readable inventory exists; should be scoped to config/lock-dir/install health.
ranked_candidates.test_need: Fixture workspaces for healthy, missing config, stale mutex, install drift.
